stagent.warn.decisionNoArtifactReview: Stagent: Decision stages do not support artifact file review.
stagent.warn.decisionNoDiff: Stagent: Decision stages do not support artifact diff.
stagent.info.newFileNoPrior: Stagent: New file or no prior version; opening current file.
stagent.warn.noDebugInstance: Stagent: No active instance to copy debug log from.
stagent.warn.noDebugLogFile: Stagent: Debug log file not found.
stagent.info.debugLogCopied: Stagent: Full debug log copied to clipboard.
stagent.warn.noSessionLog: Stagent: No session log yet (no pre-execution model calls).
stagent.info.sessionLogCopied: Stagent: Session log copied to clipboard.
stagent.warn.noActiveTaskForDebug: Stagent: No active task. Create or resume a task from the sidebar before opening the debug log.
stagent.warn.noDebugLogForTask: Stagent: Debug log not found (task may not have produced logs yet).
stagent.info.feedbackPrompt: Stagent: Workflow completed. Share quick feedback to help us improve.
stagent.info.charterFeedbackIntro: Stagent: {0} decision(s) from this session may be worth adding to your Charter. Review now?

stagent.info.recoverPrompt: Stagent: An unfinished workflow instance was found. Resume the most recent task?

stagent.warn.noRetryStage: Stagent: No workflow stage available to retry.
stagent.warn.openPanelFirst: Stagent: Open the main panel via "New AI Workflow" before using sidebar retry.
stagent.warn.sidebarRetryNotActionable: Stagent: This stage cannot be retried now. Refresh the main panel and try again.
stagent.warn.instanceNotBound: Stagent: Task instance not bound. Reopen the task from the sidebar.
stagent.warn.instanceNotFound: Stagent: Task instance not found. Reopen the task from the sidebar.
stagent.sandbox.softConstraintPrompt: Stagent: Sandbox is enabled but this platform ({0}) has no kernel-level isolation. Only soft constraints apply (not a security boundary): {1}. Continue with soft constraints or cancel?
stagent.warn.panelMessageUnhandled: Stagent: Unrecognized panel action ({0}). Update the extension or reload the window.
stagent.warn.globalStateSyncFailed: Stagent: Task index sync failed; disk state is still saved. Reopen the task from the sidebar to refresh.
stagent.error.workspacePathRequired: Stagent: Please enter a workspace folder path.
stagent.info.noLmPrompt: Stagent: No built-in language model and no stagent.llmApiKey. Open settings?
stagent.info.dagResumeInterrupted: Stagent: Previous DAG run was interrupted; pending stages were reset and scheduling will continue.
stagent.info.resumeInterrupted: Stagent: Previous run was interrupted; will re-execute from the interrupted stage.
stagent.warn.longWorkflowConfirm: Stagent: This request looks like a multi-module or full project; the generated workflow may be long. Continue?
stagent.error.llmDirectNoApiKey: Stagent: Direct API model selected but stagent.llmApiKey is not configured.
stagent.error.llmNoModelForGenerate: Stagent: No GitHub Copilot language model and no stagent.llmApiKey; cannot generate workflow.
stagent.error.llmNoModelForStage: Stagent: No GitHub Copilot language model and no stagent.llmApiKey; cannot run LLM stage.

stagent.error.polishEmptyBody: Stagent: Model did not return valid polished text.

stagent.webview.input.directGenerateDeta: Requirement looks clear — skipping extra clarification
stagent.webview.input.llmWaitingWithAuto: Will infer taskType and generate the full workflow JSON.

stagent.webview.confirm.blockingPlan: ⛔ Plan has blockers; edit requirements and regenerate
stagent.webview.confirm.cannotExecuteTit: ⛔ This plan cannot run yet (shown for review)
stagent.webview.confirm.cannotExecuteFoo: Use «Back to edit requirements» to narrow scope, or add separate writeOutputToFile stages per script in the generator.
stagent.webview.confirm.experienceRefsDe: Referenced past experience: {0} item(s) (userInput text excluded)
stagent.webview.confirm.decisionBoardGat: Resolve all pending items ({2} left) before starting.

stagent.webview.exec.afterIntro: The model needs the following after this stage (multiple questions allowed):
stagent.webview.exec.beforeIntro: Confirm the following before this stage runs:
stagent.webview.pause.qualitySoftPrompt: Complete the quality checklist above ({0} unchecked). If you reviewed manually, click «Approve decision» again or use «Ignore and approve» in the dock.
stagent.webview.pause.retryPromptPlaceho: Retry hint (optional), e.g. add boundary stress tests and keep under 800 words
stagent.webview.pause.decisionIntro: The model proposed design decisions. Your edits constrain later code directly.
stagent.webview.pause.conflictBanner: ℹ️ This workflow already has {0} approved decision record(s). Check cross-module constraints before approving.
stagent.webview.pause.checklistAlt: Does each decision explain why alternatives were rejected?
stagent.webview.pause.checklistStress: Does «Boundary stress test» include at least 2 concrete scenarios?
stagent.webview.pause.checklistAssumptio: Does «Assumptions the AI cannot verify» have at least one item?
stagent.webview.pause.checklistNoCode: Does it avoid code blocks (there should be none)?
stagent.webview.pause.checklistConflict: If existing code is involved, is conflict detection noted?
stagent.webview.pause.decisionRetryClear: Regenerating this decision clears downstream results. Continue?
stagent.webview.pause.decisionRetryDowns: Regenerating this decision will re-run {0} downstream stage(s). Continue?

stagent.webview.sidebar.retryTitle: Re-run the current stage (same as main panel Retry)
stagent.webview.plan.stageHardCap: ⚠ Stage count exceeds hard cap of 45; narrow scope or split the task
stagent.webview.plan.multiModuleNoArch: ⚠ Looks like multi-module work but no global/architecture decision stage
stagent.webview.plan.rule20Violations: Rule20 structure violations: {0} (M20.2 should block generation)
stagent.webview.plan.diffSame: Stage id list unchanged from last time
stagent.webview.plan.reviewHeader: —— Plan review (parts not visible on confirm page) ——
stagent.webview.plan.checkMultiModule: □ Multi-module / full project: missing global architecture decision?
stagent.webview.plan.checkStageBudget: □ Stage budget: need to cut scope or split the task?
stagent.webview.plan.checkModuleBoundary: □ Module boundary matches requirements? (fix in this decision record)
stagent.webview.plan.artifactConfigYaml: config.yaml exists without config.py: stage_test_run_* must not `from config import`; use yaml.safe_load or add a config.py stage.
stagent.webview.plan.artifactNoPaths: test_run stage exists but no write paths registered; check writeOutputToFile / file-write.
stagent.webview.plan.dagLinearNoDeps: DAG on (no explicit dependsOn; linear order)
stagent.webview.plan.dagWave: DAG wave scheduling (parallel within wave; decision/HITL still serial)
stagent.webview.plan.linearOrder: Linear order (stages[] index; dependsOn for validation only)
stagent.error.catalog.fallback.title: Stage execution failed
stagent.error.catalog.toolExecutionFaile: The shell command exited with a non-zero status.
Re-run the same command in a terminal to reproduce.
Fix dependencies, paths, or permissions, then click Retry.
stagent.error.catalog.commandNotFound.bo: Your computer could not find "{0}". It may not be installed yet, or VS Code may need a restart after installation.
A command required by this step was not found. The tool may not be installed, or VS Code may not see it in PATH yet.
stagent.error.catalog.commandNotFound.pl: Install {0} and make sure it is available in your PATH.
Restart VS Code after installing, or launch it from a terminal with `code .`.
Retrying usually will not help until the tool is available.
Install the missing tool and add it to your PATH.
Restart VS Code after installing, or launch it from a terminal with `code .`.
Retrying usually will not help until the tool is available.
Test or command did not pass
The command ran but returned an error (exit code 1). This is usually a code, test, or dependency issue—not a missing tool.
Open the output below and look for the first error line (often a failed test or missing import).
Fix the related implementation or test stage, then retry this step.
If dependencies are missing, run npm install in the project folder first.
code-runner did not finish within the configured timeout.
Check for long npm install steps; consider a dedicated deps stage.
Increase timeout in stage toolConfig if needed (seconds).
stagent.error.catalog.fileNotFound.title: File not found
stagent.error.catalog.fileNotFound.hint: A file-read or writeOutputToFile target path does not exist.
stagent.error.catalog.fileNotFound.playb: Confirm upstream impl stages wrote files successfully.
Check workspace folder path and pathBase (instance / workspace).
stagent.error.catalog.retryLimitExceeded: Revise inputs or decisions, then re-run from an upstream stage.
stagent.error.catalog.sandboxNetworkBloc: The command tried to reach the network while the sandbox had networking disabled.
If the command needs network (e.g. npm/pip install), allow it or run it in a dedicated deps stage.
Otherwise remove the network call, then click Retry.
stagent.error.catalog.sandboxMemoryExcee: The command was killed for exceeding the sandbox memory limit.
Reduce the workload or raise the sandbox memory limit in settings.
Split heavy steps into smaller stages, then click Retry.
stagent.error.catalog.llmTimeout.title: LLM call timed out
stagent.error.catalog.llmTimeout.hint: The model did not return a full response within stagent.llmTimeoutSeconds.
stagent.error.catalog.llmTimeout.playboo: Shorten stage input context or use a smaller model.
Click Retry to call the model again.
stagent.error.catalog.llmInvalidOutput.h: Model output could not be parsed (JSON / code / file content).
stagent.error.catalog.llmInvalidOutput.p: For impl stages, ensure systemPrompt requests code-only output.
Inspect rawOutput preview in the debug log.
stagent.error.catalog.invariantViolation: Stage config or output does not meet Rule20 / engine constraints.
Read the invariant details in the error body.
On the confirm page, check stage dependencies and decisionRecord refs.
Revise requirements and regenerate the workflow if needed.
stagent.error.catalog.confidenceTooLow.h: Stage quality/confidence score is below the pause threshold; manual review required.
stagent.error.catalog.confidenceTooLow.p: Review stage output and decision rationale.
Answer questionBefore items or edit the decision, then approve or retry.
stagent.rule20.missingDecisionStage: Impl stage is missing a paired decision stage.
stagent.rule20.brokenNamingPair: Decision stage has no downstream stage with the same semanticName (expected stage_impl_* or stage_*).
stagent.rule20.missingDecisionRecordSour: Impl stage input.sources is missing a decisionRecord dependency.
stagent.rule20.missingConstraintPrompt: Impl stage systemPrompt is missing the required constraint to implement the confirmed decision list.
stagent.rule20.testRunMustUseCodeRunner: stage_test_run_* stages must use tool="code-runner" (e.g. npm test); do not use llm-text to narrate test results.
stagent.rule20.toIssuesHorizontalLayerin: Multiple decision stages are all placed before the first impl stage (horizontal layering). Prefer interleaved decide→test_write→impl→test_run per slice (warning).
stagent.rule20.debugFeedbackLoopNotFirst: Debug workflow should prioritize feedback loop: executable reproduce/regression (code-runner/reproduce) must come before hypothesis or fix impl (I-26, warning).
stagent.rule20.debugMissingReproduceStag: Debug workflow should include a reproduce stage (warning).
stagent.rule20.debugMissingHypothesisSta: Debug workflow should include a hypothesis/root-cause stage (warning).
stagent.rule20.debugMissingVerificationS: Debug workflow is missing an executable verification stage (test_run/code-runner) (warning).
stagent.rule20.exposeAssumptionsExemptio: Impl stage has no paired decision stage but exposeAssumptions=true (exempt).
stagent.rule20.modelTierDowngrade: Detected globalConfig.modelOverrides.decisionStage; confirm this downgrade is intentional.
stagent.rule20.prototypeMissingVerificat: Prototype workflow is missing an experimental verification stage (test_run/code-runner) (warning).
stagent.rule20.prototypeMissingSuccessCr: Prototype workflow is missing success/failure criteria (warning).
stagent.rule20.prototypeImplMissingFileR: After prototype impl {0} writes "{1}", add a file-read stage or reference the artifact from the next impl via stage-output/file (warning).
stagent.rule20.debugImplMissingDecisionS: Debug fix impl should bind decision/hypothesis inputs (decisionRecord/hypothesis) (warning).
stagent.rule20.toIssuesMissingChain: to-issues vertical slice chain is incomplete; add decide/test_write/impl/test_run (warning).
stagent.rule20.toIssuesMissingVerificati: to-issues slice is missing an executable verification stage (test_run/code-runner) (warning).
stagent.rule20.toIssuesMonolithicImplNam: to-issues: avoid monolithic impl naming; use single-slice semantic names (warning).
stagent.rule20.toIssuesHighHitlRatio: to-issues HITL ratio is high ({0}); prefer AFK chains (warning).
stagent.rule20.refactorMissingDecisionSt: Refactor workflow should include stage_decide_refactor_<X> decision stages (warning).
stagent.rule20.refactorMissingVerificati: Refactor workflow is missing an executable verification stage (test_run/code-runner) (warning).
stagent.rule20.refactorMonolithicImplNam: Refactor impl naming is too aggregated; use single-slice semantic names (warning).
stagent.rule20.softwareMissingGlobalArch: Software workflow may need a global architecture decision before the first slice (see SPEC §7.8) (warning).
stagent.rule20.globalArchitectureDecisio: Engine auto-inserted global architecture decision shell (stage_decide_architecture_overview); review DecisionRecord before run. Disable stagent.autoInsertGlobalArchitectureDecision to let the model generate it.
stagent.rule20.implDecisionNotPaired: Impl has no same-name decision stage but is decision-backed (align naming or merge, warning).
stagent.rule20.decisionNotPaired: Decision has no same-name downstream but decisionRecord is consumed by impl (align naming, warning).
stagent.rule20.horizontalTdd: Horizontal TDD detected: all tests before all impls. Prefer one slice per red-green loop (warning).
stagent.rule20.improveArchitectureMissin: improve-architecture workflow should include stage_zoom_out module map (warning).
stagent.rule20.dagDependencyCycleHint: {0} (Rule20: fix before relying on DAG execution.)
stagent.rule20.dagUnreachableFromEntry: DAG mode: stages unreachable from stages[0] via deps (possible orphan): {0}{1}
stagent.rule20.label.testRunImportsMissi: test_run references Python module/script not on disk
stagent.rule20.label.softwareMissingGlob: Software task missing global architecture decision
stagent.rule20.label.globalArchitectureD: Engine inserted global architecture decision shell (review before run)
stagent.rule20.label.implDecisionNotPair: Impl without same-name decision (decision-backed; align naming)
stagent.rule20.label.decisionNotPaired: Decision without same-name downstream (referenced by impl)
stagent.rule20.label.prototypeImplMissin: Prototype impl missing file-read or downstream stage-output ref
stagent.rule20.label.debugImplMissingDec: Debug fix impl missing decision output ref
stagent.rule20.label.horizontalTdd: Horizontal TDD: all tests before all impls
stagent.rule20.label.stage_count_near_li: Stage count near limit (>45); consider splitting
stagent.rule20.label.restored_from_persi: Restored from persistence (not from this generateWorkflow)
stagent.contract.label.sampleMockSourceU: Sample and mock data do not share the same ASIN source
stagent.contract.label.weakIntegrationAs: Integration test only checks row count
stagent.contract.label.sampleHeaderUnmap: Sample Excel header not mapped by reader
stagent.contract.label.nonCanonicalKey: Key drifts from CONTEXT.md canonical terms
stagent.lint.dangerous-rm-rf-root: Detected `rm -rf /` or similar root deletion; blocked.
stagent.lint.dangerous-curl-pipe-shell: Detected curl/wget piped to shell; remote code execution risk.
stagent.lint.tsc-noemit-vs-out-dependenc: Command mixes `tsc --noEmit` with require/node ./out/...; --noEmit produces no .js. Fix: (a) drop --noEmit and compile; (b) use npx ts-node; (c) use npm test scripts.
stagent.lint.tsc-without-npx: Bare `tsc` detected; use `npx tsc` / pnpm exec / yarn dlx or node_modules/.bin/.
stagent.lint.missing-npm-install-before-: Command has `tsc` but no prior npm install/ci in linear order and none in this command; install deps first.
stagent.lint.import-meta-url-with-common: tsconfig module is CommonJS-like ({0}) but workspace/src uses import.meta; switch to ESM or remove import.meta.
stagent.lint.requirements-impossible-pyp: requirements.txt line pins impossible PyPI version: {0} ({1}). {2}. Use: {3}.
stagent.lint.config-key-not-found: {0} reads config key '{1}' but {2} does not define it (existing keys: {3}). Align naming in config or script.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingVerifica: Plan missing executable verification (code-runner / stage_test_run_*): multi-file builds without verification can report hollow success.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingMainAsse: Plan missing main/entry assembly: ≥3 code modules but no entry to run them (main.py, index.ts, App.tsx, npm start, etc.).
stagent.planCompleteness.missingTestInfr: Before first stage_test_run_*, plan must land jest/babel/tsconfig (or config stages); otherwise Jest cannot parse TypeScript.
Before first stage_test_run_*, plan must land jest-expo + babel config stages; otherwise Jest cannot parse TS in Expo/RN.
stagent.planCompleteness.testInfraPathMi: Test infra path mismatch: {0} must be under the same directory as test_run cd target ({1}). Engine validates writeOutputToFile vs test command at confirm.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingSelfHeal: Plan missing self-heal chain around test stages: {0}. Each slice needs verify_tsc, verify_imports between test_write and test_run, fix_if_failed after test_run, and npm install before the first test_run.
stagent.planCompleteness.multiFilePrompt: Stage writeOutputToFile is {0} but systemPrompt also requires other paths ({1}). Split into one stage per file (M40); single-file stages must output raw file body only (no Markdown fences or multi-file bundles).
stagent.planCompleteness.testStackNestjs: Decision stack is Express but {0} (stage {1}) systemPrompt imports @nestjs/* or NestJS TestingModule. Rewrite tests for Express/supertest or Jest without NestJS.
stagent.planCompleteness.testWriteImport: Planned test output {0} (stage {2}) systemPrompt references relative import `{1}` which is not in any writeOutputToFile artifact path. Align with planned impl paths (e.g. server/src/index.ts) or add the missing impl stage (M39.3).
Planned server integration test {0} (stage {1}) does not declare relative import paths in systemPrompt. Add explicit from '../src/...' examples matching planned writeOutputToFile paths (M39.3).
stagent.planCompleteness.upstreamFixNoIm: stage_test_run {0} has no upstream impl in its TDD slice; upstream_fix cannot route to production code.
stagent.planCompleteness.upstreamFixStac: stage_test_run {0} runs under stack {1}, but upstream_fix would fall back to {2} (stack {3}). Add a matching-stack impl before test_run or align cd/workingDir.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingPythonVe: Before first pytest test_run, plan must include venv create + pip install + import check stages (or split stage_venv_init). Expected: {0}.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingPythonTe: Flat Python layout requires {0} (or pyproject.toml pythonpath) before pytest so tests/ can import root modules.
stagent.planCompleteness.missingPythonVe: Between {0} and {1}, add stage_verify_imports_* (Python module import check).
stagent.planCompleteness.templateStageCa: Stage count exceeds path cap ({0}). Express allows ≤8 stages; prototype/other allow ≤6. Regenerate with a narrower scope or switch to a full path.
stagent.decisionLint.insufficientStressT: 「Stress test」 section has too few scenarios (current {0}, need at least 2)
stagent.decisionLint.insufficientAssumpt: 「Unverifiable assumptions」 section has too few items (current {0}, need at least 1)
stagent.hitl.decisionLintRejected: Decision record validation failed: {0}. Complete the record in the reviewer before approving.
stagent.contract.crossFileKeyNotInVocabu: Key '{0}' is not in CONTEXT.md vocabulary
stagent.contract.crossFileKeyMismatch: Consumed key '{0}' may not match produced key '{1}' in {2}
stagent.contract.sampleHeaderUnmapped: Sample header '{0}' not exactly mapped by reader (nearest '{1}'; reader exact match will fail required columns)
stagent.lint.pythonImportFileCollision: Python -c references module "{0}" which collides with a registered non-.py file{1}. Use open()/yaml instead, or add {0}.py stage. Registered:{2}
stagent.lint.pythonImportMissing: Python -c imports undeclared module "{0}"{1}. Only import generated .py or add requirements.txt. Registered:{2}
stagent.lint.pythonScriptMissing: code-runner script "{0}" is not in workflow artifacts{1}. Add writeOutputToFile or fix the path.
stagent.lint.sdkDecisionImplMismatch: DecisionRecord SDK families [{0}] vs impl [{1}] (e.g. firebase/app vs @react-native-firebase/*). Align DecisionRecord, impl, and tests.
stagent.lint.sdkDecisionTestMismatch: DecisionRecord SDK families [{0}] vs test [{1}]. Test mocks must match DecisionRecord.
stagent.lint.sdkImplTestMismatch: impl SDK families [{0}] vs test [{1}] — mocks/imports may pass Jest but fail at runtime.
stagent.lint.testImportPathNotInPlan: Test {0} imports `{1}` but artifact registry has no matching output path.
stagent.pathResolver.emptyWorkspacePath: Enter a workspace folder path. Generated runs and instance state will live under that folder in .stagent/instances/.
stagent.pathResolver.notDirectory: Workspace path is not a directory: {0}
stagent.pathResolver.missingTaskDir: Missing task workspace: enter a workspace folder on the input page and regenerate the workflow, or open a VS Code workspace folder and retry.
stagent.hitl.reason.charterProvenanceRev: Charter answer ({0}) requires human approval before continuing
stagent.hitl.reason.retryLimitReached: Manual retry {0} time(s), reached policy limit {1}
stagent.gate.redGreen.pairedTestExecExce: Paired test failed before impl (treated as RED)
stagent.gate.redGreen.pairedTestGreenBef: Paired test GREEN before impl was written — likely empty test / no real behavior check
stagent.gate.redGreen.crossSliceAlreadyG: Paired test already GREEN — prior impl ({0}) likely covers this slice; continuing (cross-slice overlap, not an empty test)
stagent.guard.activeInstance.busy: Current task is executing a stage; wait for pause or completion before switching tasks.
stagent.pregen.emptyDraft: Paste or enter a requirement draft before clicking polish.

stagent.confidence.reason.outputTooShort: Output too short ({0} chars; {1} expects at least {2})
stagent.confidence.reason.implMissingCod: Impl stage output has no code block
stagent.confidence.reason.signalsGood: Signals look good; confidence is high
stagent.quality.issue.truncatedOutput: Output contains truncation markers; may be incomplete
stagent.quality.issue.shortOutput: Output too short ({0} chars; expected at least ~{1})
stagent.quality.issue.hollowImplOutput: Impl output is hollow confirmation text without executable code

stagent.gate.debug.feedbackLoopRequired: I-26: Before hypothesis/fix impl stages, complete an executable reproduce or regression (code-runner / reproduce stage). Add a feedback loop or reorder stages.
